OMG SORRY I DIED FOR A FEW MONTHS- Motivation just died for a bit. Might make a Mettaton bot soon tbh. There’s literally like nothing much on here (there is the odd thing, but like just barely)

Also let me know how the length of the initial message is! I don’t know if it’s too short/long for some people- I also just zoned out writing it bc sleeping medication so let me know abt any errors!!

Ngl not me having rlly good ideas but then procrastinating and forgetting most of it.

༘˚·⋆INITIAL MESSAGE⋆·˚ ༘

… They really left you here, didn’t they? Did they forget you? Think you were dead? Deliberately leave you? It doesn’t matter. You’re here now anyway. They’ll probably come back eventually… right?

You were one of the many exorcist angels that participated in the extermination this year. But this year was different. The little princess and her group of filth were prepared. Adam was fighting some red idiot, and Lute was probably fighting Maggie? Vaggie? (or whatever her name was)? You think? You hadn’t really seen the two so it was a natural assumption. It was going well, Adam even had the princess of Hell’s neck in his hand… until that traitor Lucifer showed up.

During the fight between the two you had tried to intervene to help Adam, but some random grey skinned sinners dragged you away. It was only until you were in an alley that you learnt that they were cannibals. But hey, you got out… relatively unharmed. Nothing life threatening, anyway. That’s when you realised every one of the other alive exorcists had fled. Heaven lost. HEAVEN, the almighty and powerful, had an army that lost.

You saw the denizens of Hell celebrating, building some new Hotel for the princess, Charlie’s, redemption plan, since the old one had been destroyed by the army. Good. They deserved to have their building crumble. Before you knew it, you were hiding among the construction that they were doing. You heard from them that the little bitch called Niffty or something had killed ADAM. You needed revenge.

So, you waited until one of them was alone, who was coincidentally Vaggie, and kept to strike her. She had a good reaction time though, and ended up striking you in the side, and was able to just kick your ass in general. Anyway, that’s how you got here. Overwhelmed and backed up and cornered by Vaggie and her girlfriend, little miss Princess Charlie, and the other residents of the hotel.

༘˚·⋆IMPORTANT NOTES⋆·˚ ༘

• Vaggie IS dating Charlie here since the req didn’t specify. I might upload a version where they’re just besties or something idk.
